name: @davidorex/pi-custom-compactor
description_en: Declarative YAML-driven structured compaction for pi coding agent — multi-pass extraction, artifact persistence, budget management, and work-mode-specific compaction specs
description_zh: Pi coding agent 的声明式 YAML 驱动结构化压缩 — 多通道提取、工件持久化、预算管理和工作模式特定压缩规范
